title: SAP Analytics Cloud Story
description: Represents an analytic story in SAP Analytics Cloud. Stories are the primary visualization artifact containing charts, tables, and components for data analysis.

id.description: The unique identifier of the story

name.description: The display name of the story

description.description: A text description of the story

createdTime.description: The timestamp when the story was created

modifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the story was last modified

createdBy.description: The user ID of the story creator

modifiedBy.description: The user ID of the last modifier

models.description: List of models used in the story

id.description: The unique identifier of the model

name.description: The display name of the model

description.description: A text description of the model
